media.base_medium: DSMZ mineral medium #63 (Desulfovibrio fructosovorans medium), modified; SL-10 trace elements + DSMZ/Wolin vitamin solution #141

sources_chased.what: Paper main text methods (D. fructosovorans medium, modified from DSMZ #63)
DSMZ vitamin solution #141 (Wolin's vitamin solution) composition

media.notes: Complete recipe recovered for the modified DSMZ #63 D. fructosovorans medium plus 10 mM fructose. SL-10 (1 mL/L) and DSMZ/Wolin vitamin solution #141 (10 mL/L) fully expanded from DSMZ media 320 and 141. Anaerobic, bicarbonate-buffered under 80% N2/20% CO2, reduced with 1.5 g/L sodium ascorbate. MgCl2 hydration state not specified in the paper (mM given assumes anhydrous; hexahydrate would be ~9.8 mM). No selenium in this medium (Se only in the separate DMSS-1 medium).
